lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa satigur bhagat drirraae |
lines.english: The Perfect True Guru implants devotional worship within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਾ ਦੋਰਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa kaaran lab lobh kamaaveh duramat kaa doraahaa he |9|
lines.english: For the sake of poison, they act in greed and possessiveness, and evil-minded duality. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭੀਨੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: man tan har raviaa ghatt antar man bheenai bhagat salaahaa he |10|
lines.english: The Lord pervades his mind, body and heart; deep within, his mind is drenched with devotional worship and praise of the Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad har naam chit laae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he lovingly centers his consciousness on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਅਸੁਰ ਸੰਘਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh saachaa asur sanghaaran |
lines.english: My True Lord God is the Destroyer of demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh saachaa sad hee saachaa sir saahaa paatisaahaa he |11|
lines.english: My True Lord God is forever True. He is the Emperor over the heads of kings. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad bhagat nisataaran |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, His devotees are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਭਗਤ ਸਚੇ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: se bhagat sache terai man bhaae |
lines.english: True are those devotees, who are pleasing to Your Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dar keeratan kareh gur sabad suhaae |
lines.english: They sing the Kirtan of His Praises at His Door; they are embellished and exalted by the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਵਿਛੋੜਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jin aape mel vichhorreh naahee |
lines.english: Those whom You unite, Lord, are never separated again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਨਿਰਧਨ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵੇਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: saachee baanee anadin gaaveh niradhan kaa naam vesaahaa he |12|
lines.english: Night and day, they sing the True Word of His Bani. The Naam is the wealth of the poor. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sadaa saalaahee |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they praise You forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਤੂ ਏਕੋ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa sir too eko saahib sabade naam salaahaa he |13|
lines.english: You are the One Lord and Master over all. Through the Shabad, the Naam is praised. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਤੁਧੁਨੋ ਕੋਈ ਨ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai tudhuno koee na jaanee |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, no one knows You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਸੰਬਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aape sabad sadaa gur daataa har naam jap sanbaahaa he |14|
lines.english: You Yourself are the Shabad forever, the Guru, the Great Giver; chanting the Lord's Name, You bestow Your treasure. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਕਥੀ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aape kathee akath kahaanee |
lines.english: You Yourself speak the Unspoken Speech.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: too aape karataa sirajanahaaraa |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Creator of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਸਹਸਾ ਗਣਤ ਨ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam deveh too aape sahasaa ganat na taahaa he |15|
lines.english: You Yourself bless the Gurmukh with the Naam, who is no longer skeptical, and is not held to account. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: teraa likhiaa koe na mettanahaaraa |
lines.english: No one can erase what You have written.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabade sevan bhaae piaare |
lines.english: They serve the Shabad with love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਸਚੇ ਤੇਰੈ ਦਰਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat sache terai daravaare |
lines.english: Your true devotees stand at the Door of Your Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਇਕੁ ਖੇਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: merai prabh saachai ik khel rachaaeaa |
lines.english: My True Lord God has staged a play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਨਾਮੇ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸੋਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੩॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate bairaagee naame kaaraj sohaa he |16|3|12|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam remain detached; through the Naam, their affairs are resolved. ||16||3||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਜੇਹਾ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: koe na kis hee jehaa upaaeaa |
lines.english: He has created no one like anyone else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਫਰਕੁ ਕਰੇ ਵੇਖਿ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਸਭਿ ਰਸ ਦੇਹੀ ਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape farak kare vekh vigasai sabh ras dehee maahaa he |1|
lines.english: He made them different, and he gazes upon them with pleasure; he placed all the flavors in the body. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਸਕਤੀ ਦੇਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: siv sakatee dehee meh paae |
lines.english: Shiva and Shakti, energy and matter - You have placed them into the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਜੈ ਪਉਣੁ ਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਵਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: vaajai paun tai aap vajaae |
lines.english: You Yourself vibrate the beat of the breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਉਲਟੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਗਿਆਨ ਰਤਨੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ulattee hovai giaan ratan sabad taahaa he |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one turns away from the world, and attains the jewel of spiritual wisdom, and the Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: andheraa chaanan aape keea |
lines.english: He Himself created darkness and light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਬੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: eko varatai avar na beea |
lines.english: He alone is pervasive; there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਕਮਲੁ ਬਿਗਸੈ ਬੁਧਿ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee aap pachhaanai kamal bigasai budh taahaa he |3|
lines.english: One who realizes his own self - by Guru's Grace, the lotus of his mind blossoms forth. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣੀ ਗਹਣ ਗਤਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: apanee gehan gat aape jaanai |
lines.english: Only He Himself knows His depth and extent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: hor lok sun sun aakh vakhaanai |
lines.english: Other people can only listen and hear what is spoken and said.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਾਚੀ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: giaanee hovai su guramukh boojhai saachee sifat salaahaa he |4|
lines.english: One who is spiritually wise, understands himself as Gurmukh; he praises the True Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਪਟ ਖੁਲਾਵਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape kapatt khulaavanahaaraa |
lines.english: He Himself opens the doors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh sahaje amrit peevai trisanaa agan bujhaahaa he |5|
lines.english: The Gurmukh intuitively drings in the Ambrosial Nectar, and the fire of desire is quenched. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dehee andar vasat apaaraa |
lines.english: Deep within the body is the priceless object.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਖੋਜੇ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਜਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: andar khoje sabad saalaahe baahar kaahe jaahaa he |6|
lines.english: So search within yourself, and praise the Shabad. Why run around outside your self? ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਰਸ ਦੇਹੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ras dehee andar paae |
lines.english: He placed all the flavors within the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੁਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: virale kau gur sabad bujhaae |
lines.english: How rare are those who understand, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad amrit peeaeaa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਚਾਖੇ ਸਾਦੁ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vin chaakhe saad kisai na aaeaa |
lines.english: Without tasting, no one enjoys the flavor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਸੋ ਸਭਿ ਗੁਣ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap pachhaanai so sabh gun jaanai |
lines.english: One who realizes himself, knows all virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀ ਅਮਰਾ ਪਦੁ ਹੋਏ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਸੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: amrit pee amaraa pad hoe gur kai sabad ras taahaa he |7|
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar is drunk, and the immoral status is obtained, when one obtains the sublime essence of the Guru's Shabad. ||7||
